SI48_ATR.status: D3 — Track B, 0.81 [D4 CRITERIA MET — elevation C85]
SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.dc1: AI training literature — designed empirical. Confirmed C81.
SI48_ATR.dc2: Educational over-coaching — designed empirical, distinct mechanism (metacognitive displacement). Confirmed C82.
SI48_ATR.dc3: Organizational compliance layering — regulated institutional. OSHA/safety, military ROE, medical Joint Commission, AML compliance. Burke 2006 meta-analysis + Hale & Borys 1998 + Zohar & Luria 2005. Confirmed C83.
SI48_ATR.dc4: Professional credential inflation — competitive/emergent. USMLE Step 1 pass/fail (NBME institutional acknowledgment), bar exam/law school, teaching credentials (Hill 2005, Kane 2008), Chinese keju. Confirmed C84.
SI48_ATR.dc4_novel_mechanism: Competitive coordination failure: strategic recovery impossibility adds to epistemic recovery impossibility. Nash equilibrium = universal OA-optimization. Even actors who recognize d' degradation cannot unilaterally shift to CA-training without competitive disadvantage.
SI48_ATR.dc4_anchor: USMLE Step 1 pass/fail = authoritative national body explicitly acknowledged ATR mechanism at scale and intervened.
SI48_ATR.zr_cycle_5: PASS C84 (passive — USMLE intervention is further confirming evidence)
SI48_ATR.d4_criteria_status: ALL MET: 2 derivations ✓, 4 DCs ✓, 3 ontological types ✓, 5 ZR PASS ✓, confidence 0.81
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff: behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Confirmed DC#1–DC#4. DC#4 adds strategic dimension: decoupling is Nash-stable.
SI48_ATR.note: D4 structural criteria complete. Formal elevation document to be written C85.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. Effective K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.derivation_1: Formal effective-K collapse: K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε, CIAP amplifies AIIP failure
SI49_BIC.derivation_2: Information-theoretic: I(G_i; G_j) > 0 under AIIP failure + CIAP → K_eff → 1 in limit
SI49_BIC.dc1: AI evaluation benchmark literature — designed empirical. Schaeffer 2023, GLUE/SuperGLUE saturation, Magar 2022 contamination transfer, HELM. Confirmed C82.
SI49_BIC.dc2: Fine-tuning transfer / intrinsic dimensionality — designed empirical (distinct mechanism domain). Aghajanyan 2021, Phang 2018 STILTs, Dodge 2020, Liu 2019 MT-DNN. Confirmed C84.
SI49_BIC.dc2_ontological_type: designed empirical (second domain — optimization geometry vs. data/corpus layer)
SI49_BIC.dc2_novel_mechanism: Shared intrinsic fine-tuning dimensionality = geometric mechanism for K_eff collapse. DC#2 closes 'fix data contamination' response: BIC operates at representation level regardless of corpus orthogonality.
SI49_BIC.d4_path: ZR req met (4/3 DONE) + 3 ontological DC types (1/3 — both DCs designed empirical). Need DC#3 in different ontological type + DC#4 in third type.
SI49_BIC.dc3_candidate: Educational assessment portfolio (regulated institutional) or scientific replication consortia / credential markets (competitive/emergent)
key_corollaries: Portfolio diversification failure (adding correlated benchmarks has vanishing K_eff gain)
